# OpenIQX Member Profile Submission

Thank you for submitting your profile to join the **OpenIQX community**.

Please complete the checklist below before submitting your Pull Request.

---

# Checklist

## Repository Setup

* [ ] I forked the `openiqx-members` repository
* [ ] I cloned my fork locally
* [ ] I created a feature branch

Example:

```
git checkout -b feat/add-your-name
```

---

## Profile File

* [ ] I created my file inside the `members/` directory
* [ ] My filename follows the required format

Example:

```
john-doe.md
```

Rules:

* lowercase letters only
* words separated by hyphens
* must end with `.md`

---

## File Structure

I confirm my file contains the required sections:

* [ ] `# Name`
* [ ] `# Programming Languages`
* [ ] `# GitHub`
* [ ] `# LinkedIn`

These sections must follow the format provided in **template.md**.

---

## Links

* [ ] My GitHub link starts with `https://github.com/`
* [ ] My LinkedIn link starts with `https://linkedin.com/`

Example:

```
https://github.com/username
https://linkedin.com/in/username
```

---

## Open Source Contributions

* [ ] I understand the **Open Source Contributions section is optional**

If I added contributions:

* [ ] Each contribution includes both **Issue** and **Pull Request** links
* [ ] Only **merged pull requests** are listed

---

## Final Step

* [ ] I committed my changes

```
git add .
git commit -m "Add profile for Your Name"
```

* [ ] I pushed my branch

```
git push origin feat/add-your-name
```

---

# Important Notes

* Your profile must pass the **automated validation workflow** before it can be merged.
* If validation fails, please update your file and push the fix to the same branch.
* Once your Pull Request is merged, you are officially an **OpenIQX community member**.

Welcome to OpenIQX.
